content.description: Welcome to my home on the internet! I am a guy who loves technology and works to make virtual worlds fun, engaging and easy to use spaces.

projects.title: Degree Planner
projects.subtitle: Web Application
projects.description: An application build for HackWestern7 that visually shows a students degree path

projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.subtitle: Website
projects.description: A website to keep track of my past, present and future projects

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Over the years, I have used more technological tools than I care to count. Some I've liked, some I've loved and some I've loathed. With the world of technology constantly expanding, my passion for this world will help me continuously expand with it.
skills.forward: It therefore makes sense to have a priority of tools that updates as I do. I like to this of this section as my FIFA ultimate team card or my MyPlayer ratings.
skills.goal: Some new technologies I think are cool and will learn in 2022 are: React Native, Next.js and the .NET core

icons.description: I like to try new ways of improving what is in place.
I enjoy working alongside others and want to help them succeed with me.
I quickly develop new skills, while also being able to adapt to new environments.
